title: Senior Doctor - Aster DM Healthcare - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Aster DM Healthcare - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Aster DM Healthcare has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aster DM Healthcare:
Aster DM Healthcare is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aster DM Healthcare!
